text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Uuugh, I can't seem to feel any better. In times
like this...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Fukukitaru, are you heeere? You must be here
somewhere...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Waaah! How come you look so different?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... Whenever I feel down, she can always
cheer me up with a fortune reading.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Receiving a good fortune makes me happy. And
even when it's a bad result... having a good cry
helps to clear my mind. Do you feel the same
way, Suzuka?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I'm... not really here for a fortune. I don't know,
talking to Fukukitaru makes me feel better. That's
all.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
It sounds like it's the same for you. Good fortune
or bad, you still leave feeling better.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh! You're right. It's not about the result. Which
means...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Fukukitaru just has a special touch.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. She's good at helping you forget your
worries.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Then... Do you think we should tell her? That we
don't really care about the fortune telling, we just
want to talk?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I think... it's better we don't. That would probably
make her feel bad.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh... that's true. To her, fortunes are her calling.
It's like her identity.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Then let's keep this our secret! Fukukitaru's happiness is our happiness too!
